zh.lifeSummary: 當John Campbell 2nd of Ardkinglass於1415年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特阿爾德金拉斯 豪斯時，他的父親Sir Colin Og Campbell 1st. of Ardkinglass41歲，母親Christina Lamont11412歲。他於1433年與GORDOUN結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1460年在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特阿爾德金拉斯 豪斯享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Campbell 2nd of Ardkinglass于1415年出生在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特阿爾德金拉斯 豪斯时，他的父亲Sir Colin Og Campbell 1st. of Ardkinglass41岁，母亲Christina Lamont11412岁。他于1433年与GORDOUN结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1460年在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特阿爾德金拉斯 豪斯享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Campbell 2nd of Ardkinglass was born in 1415, in Ardkinglas House, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Colin Og Campbell 1st. of Ardkinglass, was 41 and his mother, Christina Lamont, was 11412. He married GORDOUN in 1433. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1460, in Ardkinglas House, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

ko.lifeSummary: John Campbell 2nd of Ardkinglass(이)가 1415년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 아드킨글라스 허스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Colin Og Campbell 1st. of Ardkinglass(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Christina Lamont(은)는 11412세였다. 그는 1433년 GORDOUN(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1460년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 아드킨글라스 허스에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Campbell 2nd of Ardkinglass родился в 1415 г. в местности ардкинглас хоус, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Colin Og Campbell 1st. of Ardkinglass было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Christina Lamont, 11412. Он женился на женщине по имени GORDOUN в 1433 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1460 г. в местности ардкинглас хоус, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.
